'''thothapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubbly|rubbly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-th-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubbly|rubbly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thothapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thothapithi|thothapithi]] || [[word:thothapiji|thothapiji]] || [[word:thothapishi|thothapishi]] || [[word:thothapiki|thothapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothaputhuthu|thothaputhuthu]] || [[word:thothapujuju|thothapujuju]] || [[word:thothapushushu|thothapushushu]] || [[word:thothapukuku|thothapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothaputhu|thothaputhu]] || [[word:thothapuju|thothapuju]] || [[word:thothapushu|thothapushu]] || [[word:thothapuku|thothapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothapufthuf|thothapufthuf]] || [[word:thothapufjuf|thothapufjuf]] || [[word:thothapufshuf|thothapufshuf]] || [[word:thothapufkuf|thothapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thothapethe|thothapethe]] || [[word:thothapeje|thothapeje]] || [[word:thothapeshe|thothapeshe]] || [[word:thothapeke|thothapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothapothotho|thothapothotho]] || [[word:thothapojojo|thothapojojo]] || [[word:thothaposhosho|thothaposhosho]] || [[word:thothapokoko|thothapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothapotho|thothapotho]] || [[word:thothapojo|thothapojo]] || [[word:thothaposho|thothaposho]] || [[word:thothapoko|thothapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothapofthof|thothapofthof]] || [[word:thothapofjof|thothapofjof]] || [[word:thothapofshof|thothapofshof]] || [[word:thothapofkof|thothapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thothapĂŻfthĂŻf|thothapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thothapĂŻfjĂŻf|thothapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thothapĂŻfshĂŻf|thothapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thothapĂŻfkĂŻf|thothapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thothapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thothapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thothapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thothapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thothapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thothapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thothapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothapĂŻfthĂŻf|thothapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thothapĂŻfjĂŻf|thothapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thothapĂŻfshĂŻf|thothapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thothapĂŻfkĂŻf|thothapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothapĂŻfthĂŻf|thothapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thothapĂŻfjĂŻf|thothapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thothapĂŻfshĂŻf|thothapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thothapĂŻfkĂŻf|thothapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thothapĂŠthĂŠ|thothapĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thothapĂŠjĂŠ|thothapĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thothapĂŠshĂŠ|thothapĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thothapĂŠkĂŠ|thothapĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothapathatha|thothapathatha]] || [[word:thothapajaja|thothapajaja]] || [[word:thothapashasha|thothapashasha]] || [[word:thothapakaka|thothapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothapatha|thothapatha]] || [[word:thothapaja|thothapaja]] || [[word:thothapasha|thothapasha]] || [[word:thothapaka|thothapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothapafthaf|thothapafthaf]] || [[word:thothapafjaf|thothapafjaf]] || [[word:thothapafshaf|thothapafshaf]] || [[word:thothapafkaf|thothapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thothapasha|thothapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thothapshĂ«sha|thothapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thothaprosha|thothaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thothapmusha|thothapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thothapyasha|thothapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothothapnkshĂ«sha|gothothapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothothapnkrosha|gothothapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothothapnkmusha|gothothapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothothapnkyasha|gothothapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thothathapasha|thothathapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thothathapshĂ«sha|thothathapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thothathaprosha|thothathaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thothathapmusha|thothathapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thothathapyasha|thothathapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothothathapnkshĂ«sha|gothothathapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothothathapnkrosha|gothothathapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothothathapnkmusha|gothothathapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothothathapnkyasha|gothothathapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thethĂŠpasha|thethĂŠpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thethĂŠpshĂ«sha|thethĂŠpshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thethĂŠprosha|thethĂŠprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thethĂŠpmusha|thethĂŠpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thethĂŠpyasha|thethĂŠpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothethĂŠpnkshĂ«sha|gothethĂŠpnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothethĂŠpnkrosha|gothethĂŠpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothethĂŠpnkmusha|gothethĂŠpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothethĂŠpnkyasha|gothethĂŠpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thothfapasha|thothfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thothfapshĂ«sha|thothfapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thothfaprosha|thothfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thothfapmusha|thothfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thothfapyasha|thothfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothothfapnkshĂ«sha|gothothfapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothothfapnkrosha|gothothfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothothfapnkmusha|gothothfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothothfapnkyasha|gothothfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
